title: Zentrale Rio
overview: Maria Halmborg is a widow. Her husband Erik - missing for years - is considered dead. Suddenly she learns that her husband allegedly lives in Rio and sets out on the journey to clarify the matter.

trailers.title: CAMILLA HORN - Ich weiß so viel von der Liebe (1939)
